title: Baked Mediterranean Potatoes
description: A flavorful and easy-to-make side dish that combines the natural sweetness of potatoes with the savory flavors of the Mediterranean.
instructions: Toss the chopped potatoes with olive oil, salt, and pepper on a baking sheet.
Bake for 20 minutes or until the potatoes start to brown.
Sprinkle the chopped parsley and olives over the potatoes.
Return to the oven for an additional 10-15 minutes or until the potatoes are golden brown.
